title: Error in Split Node due to incorrect input type
symptom: The Split Node throws an error stating 'this.getNodeParameter(…).split is not a function' when trying to split JSON elements.
applies_when: Input is an array of objects
not_this_if: Input is a string or a valid array path
root_cause: The Split Node is designed to split strings or iterate over arrays. When an array is passed directly as a string function call, it leads to a type error because the split method cannot be applied to an array.
fix_steps: Change the input from '{{ $json.products }}' to just '$json.products'
agent_instruction: Modify the Split Node input to directly reference the array without using '{{ }}'.
